temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man's face in a dimly lit room. He has short, dark hair and is looking intently forward. He wears a light-colored collared shirt and a gold ring on his right hand. He brings his hand up to his face, touching his nose and mouth area as if in deep concentration or distress. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio opens with a sharp, electronic "whoosh" sound, like a data stream being processed or a system activating. This is immediately followed by a low, tense, and suspenseful electronic score that builds a sense of anticipation and high-tech intrigue. The camera cuts to a close-up of a computer monitor. The screen is dark, displaying complex data and graphs. On the left, a large number, "453.721140," is visible. The main part of the screen shows several fluctuating graphs with a time axis marked from -12 to +12. To the right, there is a column of data with headings like "L. Brmg." and values in scientific notation. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," are superimposed over the left side of the monitor. The camera remains steady, capturing the intricate details of the on-screen data. The music continues to swell, creating a dramatic and focused atmosphere, as if a critical analysis or a complex operation is underway. The shot returns to the man, who is now looking directly at the camera with a serious and focused expression. The computer monitor from the previous scene is visible but out of focus in the foreground, creating a layered effect. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are still present in the top left corner. The camera is static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's determined face.
